name: akm-bench
description: Standalone benchmark harness for evaluating akm-assisted agent runs.

scripts.lint: bunx biome check src/ fixtures/ configs/ results/ tests/
scripts.lint:fix: bunx biome check --write src/ fixtures/ configs/ results/ tests/
scripts.format: bunx biome format --write src/ fixtures/ configs/ results/ tests/ README.md .gitignore package.json tsconfig.json biome.json
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun test ./tests
